title: The Underground Prisoners Reach the Surface
description: Pages 1–5 focus on the underground prisoners reach the surface, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Announcer, Dressrosa Citizens, Vice Admiral Maynard, Unknown person #1, Fujitora, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the former toys and underground prisoners rise into the city, while Doflamingo's officers and the Marines struggle to control the chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: People are flooding out into the colosseum from under- ground!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: It looks like the under- ground has been linked to the surface by the shifting ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: These must be the people...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: ...who were being forced to work in the under- ground port as toys!! There are soldiers, off- cials, pirates....!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: It's the surface!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: to think that so many remarkable people...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: ..were being enslaved all this time, with nobody any the wiser......!!

dialogue.speaker: Vice Admiral Maynard
dialogue.text: Who the hell told you to infiltrate the tournament, MayNard?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You impulsive fool!! You're lucky you made it out alive!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Marine HQ Vice- Admiral - MayNard The Pursuer (tournament Entrant)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: pant

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But, Bastille- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Thanks to my actions, I was able to witness it all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If we can arrest Doflamingo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It might make an impact on the whole world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Under- ground trading port.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Rustle rustle

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...this is....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's dis- guised as a pirate ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ..but it's actually a trading vessel from the Doerena Kingdom....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The "Dark sides" of all kinds of countries are gathered here in this port....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Why, IsShou- San?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Doflamingo won't be able to remain a shichibukai after this!! We should capture him now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...We've done the same thing any number of times, have we not?

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: You've been in the Marines long enough, Vice-Admiral.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Have you been ignoring them all this time...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: These...im- passionate screams of anger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: They're not crying, you under- stand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: They're enraged....!! .......!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Do you think the world gov- ernment...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: ...Is some kind of God?

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: You will follow my orders, vice- Admiral.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: relocated Royal Palace (Sunflower field).

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Law and his allies are after the smile, aren't they?!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: nyehh, dofi...I shouldn't we be pro- testing the factory?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: They won't get inside. The place is made of Kai- rouseki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: And I have the keys right here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Ehh?!! Are you sure about this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: We don't need to leave our enemies any hope...

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Still, I'm quite unimpressed by your abilities, trebol. To think you could not even protect a single young girl.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: ShadDup, GIG!! She only looks like a little girl, anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Nnyehh, Nnyehh, dof!! I'm really sorry about what happened with sugar!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I never thought a guy with both hands and legs bound would be able to knock sugar uncon- scious........!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Could anyone have predicted it?! nnyeh?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: The same goes for the Mera Mera no mi!! Who could have predicted...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: ...that the No. 2 of the revolutionary army would infil- trade the Tourna-ment?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: enough of the pathetic excuses, you insolent fools!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: G is for disgust- ing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: What's done is done....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: handing out blame at this point won't turn back the clock.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Nnyehhh!! That's our boss, all right!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Beheheh!! Take that, Lao g!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: If you must insist, I will accept your forgive- Ness!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: But, doFi!! At this rate, the Marines are going to be quite the nuisance.

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: What shall we do about Fujitora?!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: I've already spoken with him. The Marines won't come after us.

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: That said...Once Fujitora is no longer useful to us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: I think we should eliminate him. Nothing good will come of letting that man live.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Not that it will be an easy task...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Be it pirates or marines...

summary: The Underground Prisoners Reach the Surface develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Colosseum Announcer, Dressrosa Citizens, Vice Admiral Maynard, Unknown person #1, Fujitora, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
